title: Week 5 Hands On Activity Create an ML project in SAS Viya Updated
body:
INFS3822 – AI for Business Analytics



Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create a ML project in SAS Viya
Pre-requisites
Please complete all Week 5 Pre-Workshop Activities, available on Moodle, under Week 5 section.

Step by step guide
Login to SAS Viya for Learners https://www.sas.com/en_au/software/viya-for-learners.html
Click “Access for students” and login using your username and password (check the Getting Started with
SAS Viya to learn how to create an account). Then Launch SAS Viya for Learners 4
 The default landing page of SAS Viya is SAS Drive. We are not using SAS Drive for this course.
Click on the menu (top left corner icon) and select “Build Models”.
That would open Model Studio.




Click “New Project” to create a new project
 Set project name, set the project type as “Data Mining and Machine Learning” and browse for datasets




Import the dataset. When using your own dataset for the first time in SAS Viya, i.e. the dataset
ds_salaries.xlsx available on Moodle, you can import it into SAS Viya. Simply click the Import data button.
 Then, drag and drop the dataset file ds_salaries.xlsx to upload it.




Select the Target location of where the dataset file (ds_salaries.xlsx) should be stored by clicking on the
icon shown below:
 Select the folder called “CASUSER” as shown below:




Then, click the “Import item” button.
 Once the dataset is imported, click the “Add” button




The dataset is now available in your SAS Viya account and can search for the DS_SALARIES dataset
and click “OK”.




Note: Once a dataset is imported and added to your SAS Viya account, you can find it among the
available datasets (i.e. no need to import again when you need to create another project).
 Save the project
